stemHtml: Two identical aeroplanes at different masses are descending at zero wind and zero thrust. At a given angle of attack, which of the following statements correctly describes their descent characteristics?

options.a: There is no difference between the descent characteristics of the two aeroplanes.
options.b: The heavier aeroplane will glide further than the lighter aeroplane.
options.c: Both the vertical and the forward speed are greater for the heavier aeroplane.
options.d: The lighter aeroplane will glide further than the heavier aeroplane.
